channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Marathon’ Deserves To Be More Than Just An Extraction Shooter
item.description: Bungie's new game, Marathon, deserves to have more modes than just the core extraction shooter.

item.title: The Uncanny Valley
item.description: It used to be an obscure oddity, now we all need to understand it. 18 years ago, I posted this image: …and I still can’t get it out of my head. Sorry....

item.title: Scout’s Chief Digs In On Direct Sales
item.description: Scout Motors president and CEO Scott Keogh weighs in on plans to sell direct to consumers and lays out the case for the brand's electrified pickup and...

item.title: McDonald’s CEO Eats Burger, Gets Roasted By Burger King In Viral Post
item.description: Recently, a clip known as “McDonald’s CEO eats burger” racked up 145,000 shares in a day for the wrong reasons.

item.title: MacBook Neo Hands-On: The 5 Things Apple Cut To Hit The ‘Breakthrough’ $599 Price Tag
item.description: Apple has revealed the MacBook Neo, its most affordable laptop. Here’s what it looks and feels like in person.

item.title: Blood4Blood: BKFC, Danny Wimmer And 5B Take A Swing At Bare-Knuckle And Heavy Metal Fusion
item.description: BKFC and Danny Wimmer Presents are partnering for Blood4Blood, a May 6 event combining bare-knuckle fights and heavy metal in Daytona Beach.

item.title: The gap between “I” and “no one”
item.description: This is where empathy lies, and it’s an easy chasm to fall into. “I can’t imagine eating durian ice cream,” is not the same as “no one likes durian ic...

item.title: Popular (and good)
item.description: Popular is easy to measure. Good, not so much. Setting out to make something popular requires only a focus on the crowd and on the moment. Most pop mu...

item.title: A nearly perfect score
item.description: After playing 498 days in a row, my score today in Bongo was the second-highest in the world: There’s a difference between casual online games that ha...

item.title: AI slop
item.description: It’s not slop because it was created by an AI. It’s slop because it’s slop. I just read the first two pages of a sci-fi novel on my Kindle. The author...
